title: sanguisorba officinalis var. glandulosa
intro: Sanguisorba officinalis var. glandulosa, also known as the common sparrow's tail, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating heavy menstrual bleeding and other female reproductive issues, due to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sanguisorba officinalis var. glandulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve blood clotting, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sanguisorba officinalis var. glandulosa is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical poultice, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
